name: Redis RCE — Webshell Deployment
description: Redis CONFIG SET dir targeting a web-accessible path (e.g. /var/www, /app/public, /srv/http) or CONFIG SET dbfilename set to a .php filename — exploits Redis file persistence to deploy a PHP webshell for remote command execution. Technique observed in strapi-plugin-cron / strapi-plugin-events supply-chain attack.

patterns.message: Redis RCE: CONFIG SET dir targets a web-accessible path — exploits Redis to write a PHP webshell or other files.
Redis RCE: CONFIG SET dbfilename to a .php file — deploys PHP webshell via Redis database persistence.
